title: Smoky Roasted Hash with Egyptian Malts
description: A hearty breakfast dish combining smoky roasted flavor with malty Egyptian notes.
instructions: 2. In a large skillet, heat the mustard oil over medium heat.
3. Add the smoked paprika and cook for 1 minute, stirring frequently.
4. Add the roasted hash browns and stir to coat with the spice mixture.
5. Transfer the hash browns to a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 12-15 minutes, or until crispy.
6. In a small bowl, whisk together the Egyptian malt vinegar and a pinch of salt and pepper.
7. Once the hash browns are done, remove from the oven and drizzle with the vinegar mixture.
8. Sprinkle chopped chives over the top and serve immediately.
9. Serve hot alongside your favorite breakfast items.
